text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... The air is always so nice and peaceful at
shrines, don't you think?
choice_data_list: Is that why you wanted to come here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know the saying "sickness starts in the mind,"
right? I thought I'd try to chase off some bad
feelings! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We'll be done in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Whew, I feel so refreshed! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now I can party all night at the disco! Hehe,
psych! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back to the academy at Mach five! I've
got training to do!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to burn up the track today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She really seems to get her groove back after
praying at the shrine. Even her driving is sharper
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's it for the shrine! Let's get back to the
academy right away!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! Tata's keys are missing! I put them in my
pocket, but they're not there anymore...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heinous! Where did you go, my little keys?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We came all the way to the shrine, but I still have
bad luck. This is totally wack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because of the unfortunate turn of
events, Maruzensky's condition does not improve.
